description_long: This is a classic upright arcade game cabinet with a rectangular, vertical structure and a slightly angled front face for the screen and controls. The cabinet is predominantly black, with bold red and white 'ANARCHY ARCADE' branding on the marquee, control panel, and side panels. The front features a display screen set above a control panel equipped with two joysticks and several colored buttons, suggesting multiplayer capability. Below the control panel, there are two coin slots or buttons, typical of arcade machines. The side panels are decorated with large, blurred red and white text graphics, while the back is plain and unadorned. The overall build appears to be sturdy, likely constructed from wood or MDF with a laminate finish, and the screen is set within a bezel.
description: A black upright arcade game cabinet with bold red 'ANARCHY ARCADE' branding, a screen, and a control panel featuring joysticks and buttons. The side panels display large, stylized text graphics.
description_view_0: Front view showing the marquee, display screen, control panel with two joysticks and multiple buttons, and coin slots below.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the large, blurred red and white 'ANARCHY ARCADE' text graphic on the side panel.
description_view_2: Rear view showing a plain, unadorned black back panel with no visible features or graphics.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, displaying the same large, stylized text graphic in red and white.
attribute_screen_type: CRT, curved, medium-sized with a visible bezel
attribute_control_panel_layout: Two joysticks and multiple colored buttons arranged for two-player side-by-side play, with a red and blue color scheme and 'ANARCHY ARCADE' branding.
attribute_marquee_artwork: Present; features bold red 'ANARCHY ARCADE' text on a black background, matching the overall theme.
attribute_side_panel_graphics: Large, blurred red and white 'ANARCHY ARCADE' text graphics covering most of the side panels.
